briefs.title: BC Gaming Control Regulation Overhauled — New Rules Take Effect April 2026
briefs.summary: British Columbia has created a new Gaming Control Regulation under the Gaming Control Act, replacing older rules and setting updated definitions and requirements for gaming businesses, including those operating electronic slot machines, betting terminals, live dealer studios, and horse racing licences. The new regulation takes effect April 13, 2026.
briefs.action_required: Review the new BC Gaming Control Regulation before April 13, 2026 to ensure your gaming business is compliant.

key_dates.label: BC Gaming Control Regulation takes effect — compliance required
